legal.hub.title: Terms & Legal
legal.hub.intro: Fan Session is a platform that connects fans and creators for paid 1:1 video sessions. Fan Session acts solely as an intermediary. Any session contract is concluded directly between the fan and the creator. Payments are processed via Stripe, and sessions may be conducted through third-party video providers such as Google Meet or Zoom.
legal.hub.fanTermsDesc: Rules and conditions that apply when using Fan Session as a fan, including booking, payments, refunds, conduct, and account use.
legal.hub.creatorTermsDesc: Rules and conditions that apply when using Fan Session as a creator, including profile obligations, payouts, cancellations, reviews, and off-platform restrictions.
legal.hub.privacyDesc: Information about what personal data Fan Session collects, how it is used, which third parties are involved, and what rights users have under applicable privacy laws.
legal.hub.note: Please review the terms that apply to your account type before using the platform. By registering, users confirm acceptance of the applicable terms.
legal.fanTerms.title: Fan Terms
legal.fanTerms.intro: These terms apply to users who register and use Fan Session as fans. Fan Session provides access to creator profiles and supports the booking of paid 1:1 video sessions. Fan Session acts solely as an intermediary and does not become a party to the session contract between fan and creator.
legal.fanTerms.eligibility: To use Fan Session as a fan, you must create a fan account using truthful and accurate information. You must be at least 18 years old at the time of registration. Each person may maintain only one fan account.
legal.fanTerms.booking: Fans can browse creator profiles, select an offering, choose an available time slot, and submit a booking request. The booking becomes effective only after payment is received. Payment processing is handled through Stripe. Fan Session does not store the fan's credit card or bank details.
legal.fanTerms.platform: Fan Session only provides the platform and facilitates the booking flow between fans and creators. The actual session contract is entered into directly between the fan and the creator. Fan Session does not guarantee the quality, completeness, accuracy, or legality of any creator service.
legal.fanTerms.responsibilities: Fans must attend sessions on time and behave respectfully toward creators. Insults, threats, discrimination, harassment, and unlawful conduct are prohibited. Fans may not record, reproduce, distribute, or publish a session without the creator's prior written consent. Fans may not ask creators to provide unlawful or impermissible services or continue communication outside the platform to avoid using Fan Session.
legal.fanTerms.cancellations: Fans may cancel free of charge up to 24 hours before the booked time slot. If a cancellation occurs within 24 hours of the session, a refund is generally not available unless the creator also cancels or fails to conduct the session. Complaints should be submitted within 7 days after the booked time slot.
legal.fanTerms.prohibited: Fans may not provide false or misleading information, harass other users, upload unlawful content, distribute malicious code, or interfere with the platform's technical infrastructure. Violations may lead to temporary or permanent suspension of the fan account.
legal.fanTerms.termination: Fans may terminate their account at any time through the delete account functionality, where available. Fan Session may suspend or delete a fan account with immediate effect in the event of serious violations of the applicable terms.
legal.fanTerms.withdrawal: If you are a consumer, you may have a statutory right of withdrawal. Please review the full withdrawal information provided as part of the applicable fan agreement before completing registration.
legal.creatorTerms.title: Creator Terms
legal.creatorTerms.intro: These terms apply to users who register and use Fan Session as creators. Fan Session enables creators to present their offerings, receive bookings, and conduct paid 1:1 video sessions with fans. Fan Session acts solely as an intermediary, while the session contract is concluded directly between the creator and the fan.
legal.creatorTerms.eligibility: To use Fan Session as a creator, you must create a creator account and provide truthful and accurate information. You must be at least 18 years old. Each person may maintain only one creator account.
legal.creatorTerms.profile: Creators may create a profile, upload profile content, define offerings, specify prices, add descriptions, and set availability. Creators may only offer legal services within their stated area of activity. If a permit, authorization, or similar approval is required for an activity, the creator is responsible for ensuring that it remains valid throughout the contractual term.
legal.creatorTerms.payout: Fans submit booking requests and make payment in advance through the platform. Payment processing is handled via Stripe. After the booked time slot has expired, Fan Session retains the agreed commission and pays the remaining amount to the creator. A linked Stripe account is required for payouts. The creator commission is stated in the legal documents as 20% of the agreed compensation.
legal.creatorTerms.responsibilities: Creators must conduct booked sessions at the agreed time and provide the service described in their offering. Creators must treat fans with respect and may not insult, threaten, discriminate against, or harass them. Creators may not record, reproduce, distribute, or publish a session without the fan's prior written consent. Creators are responsible for the accuracy of their offering details, including prices, availability, and service descriptions.
legal.creatorTerms.offPlatform: Creators may not direct fans to other payment platforms or continue the communication or contractual relationship outside Fan Session in order to bypass the platform. Violations may constitute grounds for immediate suspension, deletion, or extraordinary termination.
legal.creatorTerms.cancellations: If a creator cancels a session, the fan's advance payment is refunded. Repeated cancellations by a creator may result in downgrade, suspension, or account restrictions. After completed sessions, fans and creators may review one another. Fan reviews may be displayed publicly on the creator profile. Creators may also block individual fans from further interaction on the platform.
legal.creatorTerms.platformRights: All rights to the Fan Session platform, including software, branding, and related materials, remain with the provider. Creators receive only a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable right to use the platform for the agreed purpose and duration. Reverse engineering, unauthorized copying, or improper use is prohibited.
legal.creatorTerms.liability: Liability and termination are governed by the applicable creator agreement and terms. Fan Session may suspend or delete creator accounts in the event of serious violations, unlawful offerings, missing required authorizations, or attempts to circumvent the platform's payment and session flow.
legal.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
legal.privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Fan Session collects, uses, stores, and shares personal data when users access the app and web platform as fans or creators.
legal.privacy.controller: Fan Session is operated by: George Jerjes, Fan-session.com, c/o Online-Impressum #7159, Europaring 90, 53757 Sankt Augustin, Germany. Email: TODO — replace placeholder with final privacy contact email.
legal.privacy.dataCollected: Depending on how the platform is used, Fan Session may collect account data such as username, email address, password, and profile images, as well as booking data, reviews, comments, creator category information, hourly rate information, and payout-related Stripe account data. Technical data such as IP address, browser type, device type, operating system, access time, and visited pages may also be collected automatically.
legal.privacy.payment: Payment processing is handled by Stripe. Fan Session itself does not store users' credit card, debit card, or bank details. Stripe processes payment-related data in accordance with its own privacy practices.
legal.privacy.video: Fan Session supports 1:1 video sessions through third-party providers such as Google Meet or Zoom. Fan Session does not record or store the contents of video calls. Processing by the video provider is governed by that provider's own privacy policy.
legal.privacy.legalBases: Personal data may be processed for contract performance, legitimate interests, legal obligations, or on the basis of user consent, depending on the type of processing involved. This includes account creation, booking management, payment handling, security, platform improvement, and optional profile content.
legal.privacy.hosting: Platform infrastructure may involve third-party providers including Amazon Web Services for hosting, Stripe for payment processing, and Google or Zoom for video services. Where data is transferred to third countries, appropriate safeguards are intended to be used.
legal.privacy.retention: Account data is generally stored for as long as the account remains active. Upon account deletion, associated personal data may be removed unless legal retention obligations apply. Certain transaction data may continue to be retained by Stripe. Reviews and comments may remain in anonymized form where justified by legitimate interests.
legal.privacy.rights: Users may have rights including access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, objection to processing, withdrawal of consent, and the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
legal.privacy.security: Fan Session states that it uses appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data. Passwords are stored in encrypted form, and data transmission is carried out through encrypted connections such as SSL/TLS.
legal.privacy.cookies: Technically necessary cookies may be used to operate the platform. Analytics or advertising cookies should only be used with the user's express consent.
legal.privacy.changes: Fan Session may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The current version should be made available on the website and in the app. Users may be notified of material changes via the app or by email.
legal.privacy.contact: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights, contact: George Jerjes, Fan-session.com, c/o Online-Impressum #7159, Europaring 90, 53757 Sankt Augustin, Germany. Email: TODO — replace placeholder with final privacy contact email.
contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Fan Session connects fans and creators through premium 1:1 video sessions. Whether you have a question, need support, or want to get in touch, we'd love to hear from you.
contact.note: We aim to make every interaction smooth, secure, and personal.
contact.helperText: We usually respond as soon as possible.
